name: reaction_test_v2
creator: elnix91
description: A simple reaction test to measure your reaction speed. Use OK or EXE to interact, and Shift and left and right arrows in the menu. If you are on Omega or Upsilon, the best results are automatically saved in a file named “rt.sav” Don’t hesitate to tell me if you find any bug on discord or by mail: @elnix91 elnix91@gmail.com
